description_long: This is a plush, pink stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoon squirrel. Its body is predominantly light pink with darker pink stripes running along its large, bushy tail and back. The toy features small, rounded ears, a white snout, and a black nose, with simple black eyes stitched onto its face. It is depicted holding a small, brown object resembling an acorn in its front paws. The surface appears soft and velvety, with visible seams outlining the limbs and tail. The overall appearance is cute and whimsical, making it appealing for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A soft, pink cartoon squirrel stuffed toy with a bushy striped tail, holding a brown acorn. It has a cute, whimsical appearance with stitched facial features and a velvety surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large, bushy tail with dark pink stripes and the rounded back of the toy.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the white snout, black nose, stitched eyes, and the brown acorn held in its paws.
description_view_2: Profile view displaying the side of the face, the acorn in the paws, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the back and tail stripes, with the head and ears partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small, round black eyes and a simple black nose. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its front paws holding a brown acorn close to its chest, head slightly tilted forward, and tail curled around the back.
